_description: CLAUDE.md's two-line grid, swept as two lines rather than the full arm x model cube: the memory line holds model fixed and sweeps arm (-> headline table); the model line holds arm fixed at brief and sweeps model (-> model-robustness table). Both lines run at the native/unstripped condition: full-spec (depth=1) for dcbench/swebench, and longmemeval's own task-level depth, which is read off its structure and not config-dialed.
